---
title: "eds212-day2-tasks"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#install.packages("ggplot2")
library(ggplot2)
library(palmerpenguins)
```

```{r}
usethis::use_git()
usethis::use_github()
```

```{r}
eq1 <- expression(x^2)

x <- 3

express <- D(expr = eq1, name = "x")

eval(express)
```

```{r}
eq <- expression(2*(3*a+2)^4-5)

a <- 1.2

answer <- D(expr= eq, name="a")
eval(answer)
```

```{r}

ggplot(data = penguins, aes(x=bill_length_mm, y= bill_depth_mm))+
  geom_point(aes(color=species))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red","pink","blue"))+
  labs( x= "bill length mm",
        y = "bill depths mm",
        title= 'Bill Lengths and Depth in mm')

```

```{r}
ggplot(data = penguins, aes(x=species, y= flipper_length_mm))+
  geom_jitter(aes(color=species))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red","pink","blue"))+
  labs( x= "species",
        y = "flipper lengths mm",
        title= "Species and flipper length in mm")
```
